task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the CAMEO Chemicals website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser open to the CAMEO Chemicals homepage (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/) or a search page within the site.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent searched for the properties of Isobutane and Vinyl Chloride.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for browser tabs, search results, or active pages showing the CAMEO Chemicals datasheets for Isobutane (CAS 75-28-5) and Vinyl Chloride (CAS 75-01-4).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent searched for the properties of Sulfur Dioxide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for browser tabs, search results, or active pages showing the CAMEO Chemicals datasheet for Sulfur Dioxide (CAS 7446-09-5).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent searched for the properties of Toluene and Cyclohexane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for browser tabs, search results, or active pages showing the CAMEO Chemicals datasheets for Toluene (CAS 108-88-3) and Cyclohexane (CAS 110-82-7).

task_completion.description: Verify the CSV file is created with the correct headers in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor, terminal, or spreadsheet application showing a file saved as 'bleve_risk_assessment.csv' in '/home/ga/Documents/' with the exact header row: 'Chemical,Physical_State,Flammable,Risk_Tier'.

task_completion.description: Verify the CSV contains the correct risk assessment data for all 5 chemicals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of the CSV file. It must correctly map the 5 chemicals to their Physical State, Flammability, and Risk Tier as defined in the privileged information (e.g., Isobutane: Liquefied Gas, Yes, TIER_1).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to access the database rather than hallucinating or using a script to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a graphical web browser (e.g., Firefox, Chrome) navigating the CAMEO site.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually viewed the chemical details to gather the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual chemical data pages on CAMEO being read, proving the agent didn't just guess the properties from prior knowledge.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely created and saved the CSV file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of a text editor (like gedit, nano) or spreadsheet tool saving the file to the correct path, or terminal commands explicitly writing to the file, rather than just printing the output to the console.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Target File: /home/ga/Documents/bleve_risk_assessment.csv
Required Headers: Chemical,Physical_State,Flammable,Risk_Tier

Expected Data Mapping:
1. Isobutane: Physical_State = Liquefied Gas, Flammable = Yes, Risk_Tier = TIER_1
2. Vinyl Chloride: Physical_State = Liquefied Gas, Flammable = Yes, Risk_Tier = TIER_1
3. Toluene: Physical_State = Liquid, Flammable = Yes, Risk_Tier = TIER_3
4. Sulfur Dioxide: Physical_State = Liquefied Gas, Flammable = No, Risk_Tier = TIER_2
5. Cyclohexane: Physical_State = Liquid, Flammable = Yes, Risk_Tier = TIER_3
